auth.login_hint: Sign in to start creating with AI
auth.register_hint: Create an account to start your AIGC journey
auth.invite_code_hint: Use an invite code to receive bonus credits on signup.
auth.agree_prefix: I have read and agree to the
auth.agree_required: Please read and accept the Terms of Service and Privacy Policy
auth.doc_footer: This document is maintained continuously. Material revisions will be announced separately. For any questions please contact
auth.account_min: Account must be at least 3 characters
auth.password_min: Password must be at least 6 characters
auth.register_success: Account created, you're now signed in
auth.gate_default_hint: Sign in to save your work and check your balance
auth.gate_authed_hint: Sign in to use the "{{label}}" feature
auth.gate_session_expired: Your session has expired, please sign in again
auth.password_min_8: Password must be at least 8 characters

settings.title: Account settings
settings.subtitle: Profile · Theme · Security
settings.old_password_min: Current password must be at least 6 chars
settings.new_password_min: New password must be at least 8 chars
settings.password_dirty_hint: Enter current + new password to enable the button

invite.title: Invite center
invite.subtitle_prefix: Invite friends to register and top up. You'll automatically receive
invite.empty_desc: Share your invite code or link with friends. You'll earn commission when they sign up and top up.
invite.rule_1: Once a friend signs up via your invite code or link, the binding is permanent and cannot be changed.
invite.rule_2_prefix: For every top-up by your friend, you will automatically receive the current commission rate (
invite.rule_2_suffix: ) as credits in your wallet. View them in Billing.
invite.rule_3: Commission credits are credited in real time and can be used directly for image / video / text generation.
invite.rule_4: Abuse such as fake invites or reselling invite codes will result in forfeiture of all rewards.

billing.title: Billing & balance
billing.subtitle: Credit history, redemption codes and top-up packages.
billing.cdk_desc: Enter a campaign / invite code to credit your account instantly. Each code can only be used once.
billing.packages_desc: Pick a package, then contact support to complete payment — credits are added once confirmed. You can also redeem CDK or earn through invites.
billing.packages_empty: No packages available right now. Please check back later or contact support.
billing.purchase_default_notice: Email our support with your UID and the package ID below. We'll top up your account within 24 hours after payment is confirmed.
billing.purchase_mail_hint: Pre-filled with UID={{uid}} and package {{id}}. You can also copy the email address manually.
billing.purchase_no_email: Support email hasn't been configured yet. Please check the announcements or try again later.
billing.purchase_mail_thanks: Payment is done. Please confirm and top up. Thanks!
billing.frozen_explainer: Frozen credits are not auto-released by time. They are converted to consumed once a task settles successfully, or auto-refunded when a task fails or times out.
billing.logs_empty_desc: Once you redeem a code or generate content, the billing entries will show up here.

keys.title: API Key management
keys.subtitle: Call this platform directly via the OpenAI-compatible protocol (the plaintext key is only returned at creation — keep it safe).
keys.stat_last_called_hint: Most recent call from any key in the window
keys.empty_desc: Click 'Create key' in the top right to issue your first API key and start using the OpenAI-compatible interface.
keys.del_dialog_desc_prefix: Are you sure you want to delete
keys.del_dialog_desc_suffix: ? The key will be invalidated immediately and clients must rotate.
keys.created_card_desc: Copy the plaintext now — it cannot be retrieved again after this card closes.

history.title: Generation history
history.subtitle: Preview, download or copy links for your images and videos; clean up by time or failure status.
history.load_failed_desc: Please refresh later or check your sign-in status.
history.empty_desc: Head to Image or Video to make your first generation.
history.del_confirm_desc: Are you sure you want to perform this action? It cannot be undone.

studio.prompt_placeholder_image: Describe the image you want to generate
studio.prompt_placeholder_video: Describe the video you want to generate
studio.prompt_placeholder_text: Describe the text content you want to generate
studio.prompt_placeholder_music: Describe the song: genre, mood, theme, vocals, etc.
studio.free_channel_need_ref: Free channel requires at least 1 reference image (image-to-video)
studio.ref_max: You can upload at most {{n}} reference image(s)
studio.toast_need_prompt: Describe what you want to create first.
generating_phrases: About to put brush to canvas
One moment — the next frame will surprise you
studio.del_3d_title: Clean up works older than 3 days
studio.del_3d_desc: Will remove all entries older than 3 days (including completed / failed / refunded) from your works gallery. Original file links already uploaded to cloud storage remain accessible.
studio.del_7d_title: Clean up works older than 7 days
studio.del_7d_desc: Will remove all entries older than 7 days (including completed / failed / refunded) from your works gallery. Original file links already uploaded to cloud storage remain accessible.
studio.del_all_desc: Will remove all entries (including completed / failed / refunded) from your works gallery. Original file links already uploaded to cloud storage remain accessible, but the gallery will be empty.

models.no_model_hint_image: No image models enabled, please contact the administrator
models.no_model_hint_video: No video models enabled, please contact the administrator
models.no_model_hint_text: No text models enabled, please contact the administrator
models.no_model_hint_music: No music models enabled, please contact the administrator

docs.title: API Reference
docs.subtitle_tail2: here and you can call text, image, and video right away.
docs.auth_after_idem: header on image / video requests to avoid double-charging.
docs.tip_video: Video: async by default returns task_id;
docs.tip_video_tail: waits up to 10 min per request.
docs.tip_poll_tail: header — wait that many seconds before the next request (usually 2–5s).
docs.tip_callback_tail: when creating a task; the server POSTs on success / failure (same JSON as poll + event).
docs.tip_url: Result URLs: poll / webhook responses return absolute https://… links in url and cover_url — ready to download.
docs.tip_billing: Image billing: after success we settle by actual output resolution (long-edge pixels) for 1K / 2K / 4K; auto top-up or refund if it differs from your request.
docs.models_intro_prefix: The list / prices below are pulled
docs.models_intro_after: from Admin → Model Prices (unit: pt / image, 1 pt = ¥1; images priced per
docs.models_load_failed_prefix: Failed to load models. Refresh later; available models follow
docs.music_table_empty: No music models yet (enable lyria / lyria-pro in the admin panel).
docs.ep_music_gen_note: Text-to-song: pass model / prompt; returns task_id (async).
docs.ep_music_poll_note: Returns status / progress / retry_after / result (mp3 + cover absolute url).
docs.sync_music_async: Async by default; async=false to wait
docs.music_t2a_intro_prefix: Text-to-song: generates a full track from a prompt. Common params:
docs.music_t2a_intro_after: . Generation is async — get task_id first, then poll.
docs.music_poll_intro: Same rules as image / video polling: while running, honor retry_after / Retry-After before the next request.
docs.music_poll_url: is the absolute mp3 audio url,
docs.music_poll_thumb: is the cover jpg; title / lyrics / duration_ms carry the song metadata.
docs.text_section_intro_prefix: Fully compatible with the OpenAI Chat API. Common params:
docs.img_t2i_intro_quality_after: ; we pick the exact tier size matching size's aspect ratio
docs.img_t2i_intro_callback: optional HTTPS webhook; webhook_url also accepted
docs.img_i2i_intro_url_or: . Values can be public URLs or
docs.img_edit_intro_prefix: /edits and /generations share the same backend; the only difference is
docs.img_edit_intro_force_ref: requires a reference image. Good for backdrop swap, inpainting, style transfer.
docs.img_poll_intro: While running, honor retry_after in JSON or the Retry-After header (don't hard-code 1.5s). When done, status=succeeded and the payload lives under result.
docs.img_poll_dims: ; width / height reflect the actual output.
docs.vid_t2v_strong: t2v and i2v share the same model
docs.vid_t2v_intro_i2v: = i2v. Async by default returns task_id; for clips ≤ 30s use
docs.vid_poll_intro: Same as image: dynamic retry_after / Retry-After while running; result holds mp4 + cover when succeeded.
docs.vid_poll_thumb: is the cover jpg if any.
docs.webhook_intro: Pass callback_url (HTTPS, publicly reachable) in POST /v1/images/generations or /v1/video/generations. On succeeded or failed, the worker POSTs JSON matching the poll response plus event (generation.succeeded / generation.failed).
docs.webhook_note_1: Also accepts webhook_url or webhook as the parameter name.
docs.webhook_note_2: HTTPS only; private / internal IPs are blocked (SSRF protection).
docs.webhook_note_3: url / cover_url in callbacks are absolute. Set Admin → System → OSS → Public base URL for a fixed domain.
docs.sizes_banana_intro_tail: : each tier is strictly ≈ (N×1024)², with W/H both multiples of 16. When passing
docs.sizes_banana_intro_size: copy directly from the table; otherwise the backend snaps your ratio to the nearest entry.
docs.sizes_gpt_intro_after_note: : completely different from the Banana table — passing Banana sizes to gpt-image-2 will be rejected. The 4K tier is actually ~2480² (not true 4096²); for real 4K use the Nano Banana family.
docs.ep_models_note: Returns all publicly available models (image / text / video); kept in sync with admin model_prices.
docs.ep_chat_note: Fully OpenAI Chat compatible; stream=true emits SSE.
docs.ep_img_gen_note: No mode = t2img; image / images[] / ref_assets[] = img2img.
docs.ep_img_edit_note: Requires at least one reference image — best for inpainting, restyle, background swap.
docs.ep_img_poll_note: For async tasks; returns status / progress / retry_after / result (absolute url).
docs.ep_video_gen_note: 6s / 10s single shot; 20s / 30s auto-extended 1~2 times. With reference = img2vid.
docs.ep_video_poll_note: Returns status / progress / retry_after / result (absolute mp4 + cover url).
docs.ep_alias_note_get: Same as above; singular / plural both accepted.
docs.sync_img_async: Sync by default; async=true returns task
docs.sync_video_async: Async by default; async=false waits sync
docs.video_notes_duration_v: Supports 6 / 10 / 20 / 30 seconds. 20 / 30s are auto-stitched into a single clip on the backend.
docs.video_notes_ratio_v: Recommended 16:9, 9:16, 1:1; for i2v the ratio is inferred from the reference if omitted.
docs.video_notes_ref_v: Accepts image / images[] / ref_assets[]; any one of them switches to i2v.
docs.video_notes_async_v: Video defaults to async=true (returns task_id); async=false waits up to 10 minutes per call.
docs.video_notes_quality_v: hd (720p) / fullhd (1080p). Grok web usually returns 720p.
docs.task_status_pending_desc: Queued (status=queued); worker hasn't picked it up yet.
docs.task_status_running_desc: Generating (status=running); response includes retry_after — poll at that interval.
docs.task_status_completed_desc: Succeeded (status=succeeded); result.data[] has absolute url, width, height, etc.
docs.task_status_failed_desc: Failed and refunded automatically; the error field carries the reason.
docs.task_status_refunded_desc: Refunded for other reasons (account invalid / upstream refused); points returned too.
docs.size_banana_1k_note: ≈ 1MP / 1024² area; drafts, quick iteration, lowest cost.
docs.size_banana_4k_note: ≈ 16MP / 4096² area; posters & print-grade. Banana 4K is widely available.
docs.size_gpt_1k_note: Standard tier, faster. Returned sizes may slightly differ.
docs.size_gpt_4k_note: gpt-image-2's 4K is actually ~2480², not true 4096². For real 4K use Nano Banana.
docs.video_table_empty: No video models enabled in admin.
docs.image_table_empty: No image models enabled in admin.
docs.text_table_empty: No text models enabled in admin.
docs.video_chip_legend_unsupported: means the duration isn't supported by this model;
docs.video_chip_legend_unset: means no price configured in admin and falls back to the base unit price.

errors.network: Network error, please try again later
errors.timeout: Request timed out, please try again
errors.internal: Server error, please try again later
